content: You appear to be stuck on [You are already at Nova Terra Industrial Belt. Mine asteroids here. Do NOT write any loop syntax, PRAYER_SET, or pseudo-code. Instead, call the mine action directly, then call it again, and again. Each mine call extracts ore. Keep calling mine until cargo is at least 60/70 full. Check cargo after each mine call. If a mine call fails, try again. This is purely mechanical — call mine, check cargo, repeat.] in phase active for 3 minutes. Assess your current situation and either continue or abandon and replan.
